'''Derilyn''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]] on the [[Elrood-Derilyn Trade Route]].

==Description==
Derilyn had two main continents that made up the vast majority of the planet's land mass. The rest of the world was covered by vast [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]], save for ice caps at both poles.

The continents were both primarily made up of rolling plains, forests, and mountain ranges. The continent in the western hemisphere had a sizable desert.

==History==
The planet was settled by colonists from [[Elrood/Legends|Elrood]] in [[3000 BBY]], joining the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. At some point in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], it was conquered by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

Derilyn was subjugated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] under [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Afren Hul]]. It was the site of the [[Sixty Hour War]] between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the Galactic Empire during the early part of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During the invasion of the planet, six Imperial [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] annihilated the third largest city of [[Paran]], using concentrated [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] fire. Several wings of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] followed the assault to ensure the devastation of Paran was complete. The city was the home of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Wuxod (senator)|Wuxod]], who was a vocal critic of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. Wuxod himself disappeared shortly before the invasion. Paran once had a population of over half a million people, though the population during the attack was reduced to about 3000. Most of the remainder died of injury, disease, and starvation.

[[Treidum]] made a run out to Derilyn of [[Roche Hive Mechanical Apparatus Design and Construction Activity for Those Who Need the Hive's Machines/Legends|Roche]] [[Siak-series protocol droid|Siak Protocol Droids]] but he was jumped by the [[Khuiumin Survivors]].<ref name="CFT">''[[Cynabar's Fantastic Technology: Droids]]''</ref>

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[Khuiumin Survivors]] [[Battle of Derilyn|destroyed]] the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Brazen]]'' stationed at the [[Derilyn Space Defense Platform]].<ref name="OE">[[Operation: Elrood (book)|''Operation: Elrood'']]</ref>

Derilyn was eventually liberated by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
